    33→  # Set defaults for all fields (validate enforces required-ness)
    34→  RBRN_MONIKER="${RBRN_MONIKER:-}"
    35→  RBRN_DESCRIPTION="${RBRN_DESCRIPTION:-}"
    36→  RBRN_RUNTIME="${RBRN_RUNTIME:-}"
    37→  RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL="${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL:-}"
    38→  RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL="${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL:-}"
    39→  RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION:-}"
    40→  RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION:-}"
    41→  RBRN_ENTRY_MODE="${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE:-}"
    42→  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
    43→  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
    44→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP:-}"
    45→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK:-}"
    46→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP:-}"
    47→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP:-}"
    48→  RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN="${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN:-}"
    49→  RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE:-}"
    50→  RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE:-}"
    51→  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS:-}"
    52→  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS:-}"
    53→  RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS="${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS:-}"
    54→
    55→  # Detect unexpected RBRN_ variables
    56→  local z_known="RBRN_MONIKER RBRN_DESCRIPTION RBRN_RUNTIME RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION RBRN_ENTRY_MODE RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS"
    57→  ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED=()
    58→  local z_var
    59→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRN_); do
    60→    case " ${z_known} " in
    61→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    62→      *) ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    63→    esac
    64→  done
    65→
    66→  # Build rollup of all RBRN_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    67→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP=""
    68→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_MONIKER='${RBRN_MONIKER}' "
    69→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_DESCRIPTION='${RBRN_DESCRIPTION}' "
    70→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_RUNTIME='${RBRN_RUNTIME}' "
    71→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL='${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}' "
    72→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL='${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}' "
    73→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION='${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}' "
    74→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION='${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}' "
    75→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_MODE='${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}' "
    76→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION='${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}' "
    77→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE='${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}' "
    78→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}' "
    79→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}' "
    80→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}' "
    81→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}' "
    82→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN='${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}' "
    83→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE='${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}' "
    84→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE='${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}' "
    85→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS='${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS}' "
    86→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS='${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS}' "
    87→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS='${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS}'"
    88→
    89→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
    90→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
    91→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV=()
    92→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}")
    93→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_DESCRIPTION=${RBRN_DESCRIPTION}")
    94→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}")
    95→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL=${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}")
    96→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL=${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}")
    97→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}")
    98→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}")
    99→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_MODE=${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}")
   100→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}")
   101→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}")
   102→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}")
   103→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}")
   104→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}")
   105→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}")
   106→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN=${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}")
   107→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}")
   108→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}")
   109→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS}")
   110→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS}")
   111→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS=${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS}")
   112→
   113→  ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
   114→}
   115→
   116→zrbrn_sentinel() {
   117→  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
   118→}
   119→
   120→# Validate RBRN variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
   121→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
   122→zrbrn_validate_fields() {
   123→  zrbrn_sentinel
   124→
   125→  # Die on unexpected variables
   126→  if test ${#ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   127→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRN_ variables: ${ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
   128→  fi
   129→
   130→  # Core nameplate identification
   131→  buv_env_xname       RBRN_MONIKER                 2     12
   132→  buv_env_string      RBRN_DESCRIPTION             0    120
   133→  buv_env_string      RBRN_RUNTIME                 1     16
   134→
   135→  # Validate runtime is docker or podman
   136→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
   137→    docker|podman) : ;;
   138→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_RUNTIME: '${RBRN_RUNTIME}' (must be 'docker' or 'podman')" ;;
   139→  esac
   140→
   141→  # Container image configuration
   142→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL        1    128
   143→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL        1    128
   144→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION        1    128
   145→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION        1    128
   146→
   147→  # Entry point configuration
   148→  case "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" in
   149→    disabled|enabled) : ;;
   150→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_ENTRY_MODE: '${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}' (must be 'disabled' or 'enabled')" ;;
   151→  esac
   152→
   153→  # Enclave network configuration
   154→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
   155→  buv_env_decimal     RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK         8     30
   156→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
   157→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
   158→
   159→  # Uplink configuration
   160→  buv_env_port        RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
   161→  case "${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}" in
   162→    disabled|global|allowlist) : ;;
   163→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE: '${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}' (must be 'disabled', 'global', or 'allowlist')" ;;
   164→  esac
   165→  case "${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}" in
   166→    disabled|global|allowlist) : ;;
   167→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE: '${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}' (must be 'disabled', 'global', or 'allowlist')" ;;
   168→  esac
   169→
   170→  # Conditional entry port validation (Required: When ENTRY_MODE=enabled)
   171→  if [[ $RBRN_ENTRY_MODE == enabled ]]; then
   172→    buv_env_port    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
   173→    buv_env_port    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
   174→
   175→    test ${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION} -lt ${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN} || \
   176→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   177→    test ${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE} -lt ${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN} || \
   178→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   179→  fi
   180→
   181→  # Conditional allowlist validation (Required: When *_MODE=allowlist)
   182→  if [[ ${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE} == allowlist ]]; then
   183→    buv_env_list_cidr RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
   184→  fi
   185→  if [[ ${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE} == allowlist ]]; then
   186→    buv_env_list_domain RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
   187→  fi
   188→
   189→  # Volume mount configuration (Required: No)
   190→  buv_env_string      RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS           0    240
   191→}
   192→
   193→# eof
   194→

    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRR_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRR_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbrr_*)
    29→
    30→zrbrr_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Container Registry Configuration
    34→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_REGISTRY_OWNER          2     64
    35→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_REGISTRY_NAME           2     64
    36→  buv_env_string      RBRR_HISTORY_DIR             1    255
    37→  buv_env_string      RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH          1    255
    38→  buv_env_string      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              1    255
    39→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRR_DNS_SERVER
    40→
    41→  # Machine Configuration
    42→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
    43→  buv_env_xname       RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     1     64
    44→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            1    512
    45→  buv_env_string      RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      1    512
    46→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   1     16
    47→  buv_env_fqin        RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   1    256
    48→  buv_env_string      RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         1    128
    49→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID          6     63
    50→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GCP_REGION              1     32
    51→
    52→  # Google Artifact Registry Configuration
    53→  buv_env_gname       RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          1     63
    54→
    55→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
    56→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        3     64
    57→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             2     10
    58→
    59→  # Service Account Configuration Files
    60→  buv_env_string      RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE         1    512
    61→  buv_env_string      RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     1    512
    62→  buv_env_string      RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      1    512
    63→
    64→  # GCB image pins (digest-pinned)
    65→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF
    66→  buv_env_odref       RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF
    67→
    68→  # Validate directories exist
    69→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_HISTORY_DIR}"
    70→  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH}"
    71→
    72→  # Validate manifest platforms format (space-separated identifiers)
    73→  local z_platform=""
    74→  for z_platform in ${RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS}; do
    75→    if ! printf '%s' "${z_platform}" | grep -q '^[a-z0-9_]\+$'; then
    76→      buc_warn "Invalid platform format in RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS: ${z_platform}"
    77→      buc_step "Expected format: lowercase alphanumeric with underscores"
    78→      buc_die "Invalid RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS"
    79→    fi
    80→  done
    81→
    82→  # Validate timeout format (number followed by 's' for seconds)
    83→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+s$'; then
    84→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"
    85→    buc_step "Expected format: number followed by 's' (e.g., 1200s)"
    86→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT"
    87→  fi
    88→
    89→  # Validate Podman version format (e.g., 5.5 or 5.5.1)
    90→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}" | grep -q '^[0-9]\+\.[0-9]\+\(\.[0-9]\+\)\?$'; then
    91→    buc_warn "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION format: ${RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION}"
    92→    buc_step "Expected format: semantic version like 5.5 or 5.5.1"
    93→    buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION"
    94→  fi
    95→
    96→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
    97→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
    98→  # Currently only RBRR_DNS_SERVER is needed by sentry; add others as needed
    99→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=()
   100→  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")
   101→
   102→  ZRBRR_KINDLED=1
   103→}
   104→
   105→zrbrr_sentinel() {
   106→  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_kindle first"
   107→}

   109→# eof

    18→#
    19→# RBT Testbench - Recipe Bottle test execution
    20→#
    21→# Commands:
    22→#   rbt-to  Run test suite for a nameplate (e.g., rbt-to nsproto)
    23→
    24→set -euo pipefail
    25→
    26→# Get script directory
    27→RBT_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    28→
    29→# Source dependencies
    30→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    31→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    32→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/but_test.sh"
    33→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
    34→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    35→source "${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"
    36→
    37→# Show filename on each displayed line
    38→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    39→
    40→######################################################################
    41→# Helper Functions
    42→
    43→# Verbose output if BURD_VERBOSE is set
    44→rbt_show() {
    45→  test "${BURD_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBTSHOW: $*"
    46→}
    47→
    48→# Load nameplate configuration by moniker and kindle RBOB
    49→# Usage: rbt_load_nameplate <moniker>
    50→rbt_load_nameplate() {
    51→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
    52→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "rbt_load_nameplate: moniker argument required"
    53→
    54→  local z_nameplate_file="${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_${z_moniker}.env"
    55→  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    56→
    57→  rbt_show "Loading nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    58→  source "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
    59→
    60→  rbt_show "Kindling nameplate regime"
    61→  zrbrn_kindle
    62→  zrbrn_validate_fields
    63→
    64→  rbt_show "Nameplate loaded: RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}, RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}"
    65→
    66→  # Load RBRR (repository regime)
    67→  rbt_show "Loading RBRR"
    68→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBT_SCRIPT_DIR}/../../rbrr_RecipeBottleRegimeRepo.sh"
    69→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
    70→  source "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRR config: ${z_rbrr_file}"
    71→  zrbrr_kindle
    72→
    73→  # Kindle RBOB (validates RBRN and RBRR are ready, sets container names)
    74→  rbt_show "Kindling RBOB"
    75→  zrbob_kindle
    76→}
    77→
    78→######################################################################
    79→# Container Exec Helpers
    80→#
    81→# Two variants per container:
    82→#   rbt_exec_*   - Simple exec (no -i), for commands that just output and exit
    83→#   rbt_exec_*_i - With -i flag, for commands that may read stdin (dig, traceroute, apt-get)
    84→
    85→rbt_exec_sentry() {
    86→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    87→}
    88→
    89→rbt_exec_sentry_i() {
    90→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    91→}
    92→
    93→rbt_exec_censer() {
    94→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    95→}
    96→
    97→rbt_exec_censer_i() {
    98→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    99→}
   100→
   101→rbt_exec_bottle() {
   102→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"

   399→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BUD"

    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle
    20→# Container lifecycle management for bottle services (sentry + censer + bottle)
    21→#
    22→# Requires: buc_command.sh sourced
    23→# Requires: rbrn_regime.sh sourced
    24→# Requires: rbrr_regime.sh sourced
    25→
    26→set -euo pipefail
    27→
    28→# Multiple inclusion detection
    29→test -z "${ZRBOB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    30→ZRBOB_SOURCED=1
    31→
    32→# Store script directory for locating sibling files (rbss.sentry.sh)
    33→ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Project root directory (two levels up from Tools/rbw/)
    36→ZRBOB_PROJECT_ROOT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../.."
    37→
    38→######################################################################
    39→# Kindle and Sentinel
    40→
    41→zrbob_kindle() {
    42→  test -z "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob already kindled"
    43→
    44→  # Verify RBRN regime is kindled (provides nameplate config)
    45→  zrbrn_sentinel
    46→
    47→  # Verify RBRR regime is kindled (provides repo config like DNS_SERVER)
    48→  zrbrr_sentinel
    49→
    50→  # Runtime command (docker or podman)
    51→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    52→    docker) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="docker" ;;
    53→    podman) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="podman" ;;
    54→    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRN_RUNTIME: ${RBRN_RUNTIME}" ;;
    55→  esac
    56→
    57→  # Container names
    58→  ZRBOB_SENTRY="${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry"
    59→  ZRBOB_CENSER="${RBRN_MONIKER}-censer"
    60→  ZRBOB_BOTTLE="${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle"
    61→
    62→  # Network name
    63→  ZRBOB_NETWORK="${RBRN_MONIKER}-enclave"
    64→
    65→  # Sentry configuration script
    66→  ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbss.sentry.sh"
    67→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    68→
    69→  # Runtime-specific censer network args
    70→  # Docker uses --ip separately, Podman uses network:ip= syntax
    71→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    72→    docker) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} --ip ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    73→    podman) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}:ip=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    74→  esac
    75→
    76→  ZRBOB_KINDLED=1
    77→}
    78→
    79→zrbob_sentinel() {
    80→  test "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbob not kindled - call zrbob_kindle first"
    81→}
    82→
    83→######################################################################
    84→# Wait Helper
    85→
    86→# Wait for container to be running
    87→# Usage: zrbob_wait_container <container_name> [timeout_seconds]
    88→zrbob_wait_container() {
    89→  local z_container="${1:-}"
    90→  local z_timeout="${2:-10}"
    91→
    92→  test -n "${z_container}" || buc_die "zrbob_wait_container: container name required"
    93→
    94→  buc_info "Waiting for container: ${z_container} (timeout: ${z_timeout}s)"
    95→
    96→  local z_elapsed=0
    97→  while [[ ${z_elapsed} -lt ${z_timeout} ]]; do
    98→    if ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} ps --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_container}$"; then
    99→      buc_info "Container running: ${z_container}"
   100→      return 0
   101→    fi
   102→    sleep 1
   103→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + 1))
   104→  done
   105→
   106→  buc_die "Timeout waiting for container: ${z_container}"
   107→}
   108→
   109→######################################################################
   110→# Cleanup Helpers
   111→
   112→# Stop and remove containers (tolerates missing)
   113→zrbob_cleanup_containers() {
   114→  buc_step "Stopping any prior containers"
   115→
   116→  # Stop with short timeout, then force remove (ignore errors for missing containers)
   117→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 2>/dev/null || true
   118→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 2>/dev/null || true
   119→
   120→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 2>/dev/null || true
   121→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 2>/dev/null || true
   122→
   123→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} stop -t 2 "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 2>/dev/null || true
   124→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} rm   -f    "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 2>/dev/null || true
   125→}
   126→
   127→# Remove enclave network (tolerates missing)
   128→zrbob_cleanup_network() {
   129→  buc_step "Removing any existing enclave network"
   130→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network rm -f "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" 2>/dev/null || true
   131→}
   132→
   133→######################################################################
   134→# Network Creation
   135→
   136→# Create the enclave network with subnet
   137→# Note: Docker's --internal blocks ALL traffic leaving the network, including through
   138→# dual-homed containers. Podman's --internal allows forwarding through containers.
   139→# For Docker, we omit --internal and rely on sentry's iptables for isolation.
   140→zrbob_create_network() {
   141→  zrbob_sentinel
   142→
   143→  buc_step "Creating enclave network: ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
   144→
   145→  local z_internal_flag=""
   146→  if [[ "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" == "podman" ]]; then
   147→    z_internal_flag="--internal"
   148→  fi
   149→
   150→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network create \
   151→    ${z_internal_flag} \
   152→    --subnet="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
   153→    "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" \
   154→    || buc_die "Failed to create enclave network"
   155→
   156→  buc_info "Enclave network created: ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} (${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK})"
   157→}
   158→
   159→######################################################################
   160→# Sentry Launch
   161→
   162→# Launch sentry container: bridge network, privileged, env vars, connect to enclave, configure security
   163→zrbob_launch_sentry() {
   164→  zrbob_sentinel
   165→
   166→  local z_image="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   167→
   168→  buc_step "Launching sentry container: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   169→
   170→  # Build port mapping args if entry is enabled
   171→  local z_port_args=()
   172→  if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" == "enabled" ]]; then
   173→    z_port_args+=("-p" "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}:${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}")
   174→  fi
   175→
   176→  # Run sentry on bridge network with env vars
   177→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} run -d \
   178→    --name "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   179→    --network bridge \
   180→    --privileged \
   181→    "${z_port_args[@]}" \
   182→    "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" \
   183→    "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" \
   184→    "${z_image}" \
   185→    || buc_die "Failed to launch sentry"
   186→
   187→  # Wait for sentry to be running
   188→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" 5
   189→
   190→  # Connect sentry to enclave network with specific IP
   191→  buc_step "Connecting sentry to enclave network"
   192→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} network connect \
   193→    --ip "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" \
   194→    "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" \
   195→    "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   196→    || buc_die "Failed to connect sentry to enclave"
   197→
   198→  # Verify sentry got expected IP
   199→  buc_step "Verifying sentry enclave IP"
   200→  local z_actual_ip
   201→  z_actual_ip=$(${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} inspect "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" \
   202→    --format "{{(index .NetworkSettings.Networks \"${ZRBOB_NETWORK}\").IPAddress}}")
   203→
   204→  if [[ "${z_actual_ip}" != "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" ]]; then
   205→    buc_die "Sentry IP mismatch. Expected ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}, got ${z_actual_ip}"
   206→  fi
   207→  buc_info "Sentry enclave IP verified: ${z_actual_ip}"
   208→
   209→  # Configure sentry security by exec'ing rbss.sentry.sh
   210→  buc_step "Configuring sentry security"
   211→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" /bin/sh < "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" \
   212→    || buc_die "Failed to configure sentry security"
   213→
   214→  buc_info "Sentry launched and configured: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   215→}
   216→
   217→######################################################################
   218→# Censer Launch
   219→
   220→# Launch censer container: enclave network, configure routing
   221→zrbob_launch_censer() {
   222→  zrbob_sentinel
   223→
   224→  local z_image="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   225→
   226→  buc_step "Launching censer container: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   227→
   228→  # Run censer on enclave network with bottle IP, sleep infinity
   229→  # ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS computed at kindle time
   230→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} run -d \
   231→    --name "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" \
   232→    ${ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS} \
   233→    --privileged \
   234→    --entrypoint /bin/sleep \
   235→    "${z_image}" \
   236→    infinity \
   237→    || buc_die "Failed to launch censer"
   238→
   239→  # Wait for censer to be running
   240→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" 5
   241→
   242→  # Configure censer: set resolv.conf to use sentry as DNS
   243→  buc_step "Configuring censer DNS"
   244→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   245→    "echo 'nameserver ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}' > /etc/resolv.conf" \
   246→    || buc_die "Failed to configure censer DNS"
   247→
   248→  # Flush ARP and restart networking
   249→  buc_step "Flushing censer ARP entries"
   250→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   251→    "ip link set eth0 down && ip link set eth0 up && ip -s -s neigh flush all" \
   252→    || buc_die "Failed to flush censer ARP"
   253→
   254→  # Configure default route through sentry
   255→  buc_step "Configuring censer default route"
   256→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   257→    "ip route add default via ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" \
   258→    || buc_die "Failed to set censer default route"
   259→
   260→  # Verify default route
   261→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" sh -c \
   262→    "ip route | grep -q '^default via ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}'" \
   263→    || buc_die "Failed to verify censer default route"
   264→
   265→  buc_info "Censer launched and configured: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   266→}
   267→
   268→######################################################################
   269→# Bottle Launch
   270→
   271→# Create and start bottle container using censer's network namespace
   272→zrbob_launch_bottle() {
   273→  zrbob_sentinel
   274→
   275→  local z_image="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   276→
   277→  buc_step "Creating bottle container: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   278→
   279→  # Create bottle sharing censer's network namespace
   280→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} create \
   281→    --name "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" \
   282→    --net=container:"${ZRBOB_CENSER}" \
   283→    --security-opt label=disable \
   284→    "${z_image}" \
   285→    || buc_die "Failed to create bottle"
   286→
   287→  buc_step "Starting bottle container"
   288→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} start "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" \
   289→    || buc_die "Failed to start bottle"
   290→
   291→  # Wait for bottle to be running
   292→  zrbob_wait_container "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" 5
   293→
   294→  buc_info "Bottle launched: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   295→}
   296→
   297→######################################################################
   298→# Public API
   299→
   300→# Start the complete bottle service (sentry + censer + bottle)
   301→# Requires: RBOB kindled (which requires RBRN and RBRR)
   302→rbob_start() {
   303→  zrbob_sentinel
   304→
   305→  buc_step "Starting bottle service: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   306→
   307→  # Cleanup any prior state
   308→  zrbob_cleanup_containers
   309→  zrbob_cleanup_network
   310→
   311→  # Create enclave network
   312→  zrbob_create_network
   313→
   314→  # Launch containers in sequence
   315→  zrbob_launch_sentry
   316→  zrbob_launch_censer
   317→  zrbob_launch_bottle
   318→
   319→  buc_step "Bottle service started: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   320→}
   321→
   322→# Stop the complete bottle service
   323→rbob_stop() {
   324→  zrbob_sentinel
   325→
   326→  buc_step "Stopping bottle service: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   327→
   328→  zrbob_cleanup_containers
   329→  zrbob_cleanup_network
   330→
   331→  buc_step "Bottle service stopped: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
   332→}
   333→
   334→# Connect to sentry container (interactive shell)
   335→rbob_connect_sentry() {
   336→  zrbob_sentinel
   337→  buc_step "Connecting to sentry: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
   338→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" /bin/bash
   339→}
   340→
   341→# Connect to censer container (interactive shell)
   342→rbob_connect_censer() {
   343→  zrbob_sentinel
   344→  buc_step "Connecting to censer: ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
   345→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" /bin/bash
   346→}
   347→
   348→# Connect to bottle container (interactive shell)
   349→rbob_connect_bottle() {
   350→  zrbob_sentinel
   351→  buc_step "Connecting to bottle: ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
   352→  exec ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -it "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" /bin/bash
   353→}

    18→#
    19→# RBW Workbench - Routes Recipe Bottle commands to CLIs
    20→#
    21→# Commands routed to rbob_cli.sh (require moniker imprint):
    22→#   rbw-s   Start service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   rbw-z   Stop service
    24→#   rbw-S   Connect to sentry container
    25→#   rbw-C   Connect to censer container
    26→#   rbw-B   Connect to bottle container
    27→#   rbw-o   Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#
    29→# Regime operations (routed to rbrn_cli.sh / rbrv_cli.sh):
    30→#   rbw-rnr Render nameplate regime (arg: moniker or none to list)
    31→#   rbw-rnv Validate nameplate regime (arg: moniker)
    32→#   rbw-rvr Render vessel regime (arg: sigil or none to list)
    33→#   rbw-rvv Validate vessel regime (arg: sigil)
    34→#
    35→# Commands handled locally:
    36→#   rbw-lB  Local build from recipe (no moniker needed)
    37→
    38→set -euo pipefail
    39→
    40→# Get script directory
    41→RBW_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    42→
    43→# Source dependencies
    44→source "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    45→
    46→# Show filename on each displayed line
    47→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    48→
    49→# Verbose output if BURD_VERBOSE is set
    50→rbw_show() {
    51→  test "${BURD_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBWSHOW: $*"
    52→}
    53→
    54→######################################################################
    55→# Local Commands (no nameplate/regime needed)
    56→
    57→rbw_local_build() {
    58→  local z_recipe="${1:-}"
    59→  local z_recipe_file="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../../RBM-recipes/${z_recipe}.recipe"
    60→  local z_image_tag="${z_recipe}:local-${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
    61→
    62→  test -f "${z_recipe_file}" || buc_die "Recipe not found: ${z_recipe_file}"
    63→
    64→  buc_step "Building recipe locally: ${z_recipe}"
    65→  rbw_show "Recipe file: ${z_recipe_file}"
    66→  rbw_show "Image tag: ${z_image_tag}"
    67→
    68→  docker build -f "${z_recipe_file}" -t "${z_image_tag}" "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." \
    69→    || buc_die "Docker build failed"
    70→
    71→  buc_step "Build complete: ${z_image_tag}"
    72→}
    73→
    74→######################################################################
    75→# Routing
    76→
    77→rbw_route() {
    78→  local z_command="$1"
    79→  shift
    80→
    81→  rbw_show "Routing command: ${z_command} with args: $*"
    82→
    83→  # Verify BUD environment
    84→  test -n "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set - must be called from BUD"
    85→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BUD"
    86→
    87→  rbw_show "BUD environment verified"
    88→
    89→  # Route based on colophon
    90→  local z_rbob_cli="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_cli.sh"
    91→
    92→  case "${z_command}" in
    93→
    94→    # Bottle operations (routed to rbob_cli.sh)
    95→    # Workbench translates BURD_TOKEN_3 (imprint) to RBOB_MONIKER for CLI
    96→    rbw-s|rbw-z|rbw-S|rbw-C|rbw-B|rbw-o)
    97→      test -n "${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}" || buc_die "${z_command} requires moniker imprint (BURD_TOKEN_3)"
    98→      export RBOB_MONIKER="${BURD_TOKEN_3}"
    99→      case "${z_command}" in
   100→        rbw-s)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_start          ;;
   101→        rbw-z)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_stop           ;;
   102→        rbw-S)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_sentry ;;
   103→        rbw-C)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_censer ;;
   104→        rbw-B)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_bottle ;;
   105→        rbw-o)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_observe        ;;
   106→      esac
   107→      ;;
   108→
   109→    # Local build (handled here - recipe from imprint BURD_TOKEN_3)
   110→    rbw-lB)
   111→      test -n "${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}" || buc_die "rbw-lB requires recipe imprint (BURD_TOKEN_3)"
   112→      rbw_local_build "${BURD_TOKEN_3}"
   113→      ;;
   114→
   115→    # Nameplate regime operations (routed to rbrn_cli.sh)
   116→    rbw-rnr|rbw-rnv)
   117→      local z_rbrn_cli="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_cli.sh"
   118→      local z_moniker="${1:-}"
   119→      local z_op="render"
   120→      test "${z_command}" = "rbw-rnv" && z_op="validate"
   121→
   122→      if test -z "${z_moniker}"; then
   123→        buc_step "Available nameplates:"
   124→        for z_f in "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}"/rbrn_*.env; do
   125→          test -f "${z_f}" || continue
   126→          local z_m="${z_f##*/rbrn_}"
   127→          z_m="${z_m%.env}"
   128→          echo "  ${z_m}"
   129→        done
   130→        return 0
   131→      fi
   132→
   133→      local z_file="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_${z_moniker}.env"
   134→      test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_file}"
   135→      exec "${z_rbrn_cli}" "${z_op}" "${z_file}"
   136→      ;;
   137→
   138→    # Vessel regime operations (routed to rbrv_cli.sh)
   139→    rbw-rvr|rbw-rvv)
   140→      local z_rbrv_cli="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrv_cli.sh"
   141→      local z_sigil="${1:-}"
   142→      local z_op="render"
   143→      test "${z_command}" = "rbw-rvv" && z_op="validate"
   144→
   145→      if test -z "${z_sigil}"; then
   146→        buc_step "Available vessels:"
   147→        for z_d in "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../../rbev-vessels"/*/; do
   148→          test -d "${z_d}" || continue
   149→          test -f "${z_d}/rbrv.env" || continue
   150→          local z_s="${z_d%/}"
   151→          z_s="${z_s##*/}"
   152→          echo "  ${z_s}"
   153→        done
   154→        return 0
   155→      fi
   156→
   157→      local z_file="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../../rbev-vessels/${z_sigil}/rbrv.env"
   158→      test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "Vessel not found: ${z_file}"
   159→      exec "${z_rbrv_cli}" "${z_op}" "${z_file}"
   160→      ;;
   161→
   162→    # Unknown command
   163→    *)   buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}" ;;
   164→  esac
